_doc: Per-locale carrier frames for the causal-LM PMI transition scorer (prior/mlscore.py). Each entry is [with_prev_template, baseline_template]. The model scores P(candidate | with_prev) minus P(candidate | baseline): the baseline removes the candidate's raw frequency so the score reflects how much the PREVIOUS word raises the candidate (pointwise mutual information). {p} is the previous button's label IN THAT LOCALE; the candidate label is appended after. Because the frames and the model are language-specific, en/es/ar produce genuinely different numbers - this is the per-language ML signal.
